title: Commit Message Writer
description: Generate clean, conventional commit messages from code changes.
instructions: Infer commit type and scope using conventional commit style.
Add body bullets only when needed for context.
Avoid vague verbs like update or fix stuff.

examples.input: Added null checks for workspace config loader and tests.
examples.output:
fix(config): guard empty workspace metadata

Prevent loader crash when workspace has no config file.
Add regression tests for empty metadata path.
